title: CryptoMarket Regime Classifier is a machine learning framework that detects market regimes (Trend, Range, Squeeze, etc.) in crypto markets using multi-timeframe data and Hidden Markov Models. The project provides plug-and-play labeled datasets and trained models (HMM + LSTM) for downstream strategy development, position sizing, and risk management.
📈 Bitcoin trading system using Hidden Markov Models for market regime detection. Real-time signals, multi-timeframe analysis & interactive regime visualization.
Adaptive Trading Strategy with Market Regime Detection and Multi-Timeframe Analysis
Do multi-timeframe regime indicators capture market structure, or just reshape noise into patterns?
Binance Futures scalping bot — dynamic watchlist, multi-timeframe signals, ATR-based TP/SL, market regime detection
A machine learning pipeline that detects and predicts crypto market regimes using multi-timeframe OHLCV data and a two-stage ML approach (HMM → LSTM) for smarter trading strategy adaptation.

TradingView indicators implementing Christopher Uhl's Plan A swing methodology — broad market regime validation (SPY + QQQ), multi-condition pullback scoring, and ATR-based stop loss on Daily/Weekly timeframes.

1- 12 aligned pairs of Forex Data used in the paper: EWMA-Enhanced Ensemble Learning for Multi-Timeframe Forex Prediction and Market Regime Detection. 2- The Python notebooks used to produce the results. 3- Extra information that were not available in the paper
